overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character riding a mechanical mount through a snowy mountainous landscape transitioning to autumn forests. The character gallops along natural trails, crosses a wooden bridge, and discovers survey points and campsites in a high-quality game engine environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with scattered pines

agents.ego_description: galloping on mechanical mount through open snowy mountain terrain at high speed

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain trail with visible galloping tracks
tall snow-dusted evergreen trees lining the left side
dense forest of pine trees on the right hillside
steep rocky mountain face with snow patches
patches of distinctive red vegetation characteristic of the game world

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide snowy mountain trail. The character rides a mechanical mount at high speed through snow-covered ground flanked by pine forests and rocky mountain cliffs in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass leading to wooden bridge

events.description: crosses a wooden bridge and receives survey drone discovery notification

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain and crossing a wooden bridge over a snow-filled gap

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge spanning a rocky gap in the trail
large boulders and rock formations flanking the path
steep rocky hillside on the right

segments.scene_description: The path narrows through rocky terrain before crossing a wooden bridge. The environment becomes more enclosed with rocks flanking the trail, and a UI notification appears indicating a survey drone discovery in the Dauntless Mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley with mixed autumn and winter foliage

events.description: transitions from snowy highlands to valley with autumn-colored trees and less snow coverage

agents.ego_description: descending through mountain valley with mixed foliage while maintaining high speed

entered.detail: trees with yellow and orange autumn foliage indicating seasonal transition
fog-filled valley between distant mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider valley with less snow coverage. Autumn-colored trees with yellow foliage appear on the right while snow-dusted pines remain on the left, creating a transition zone between winter and autumn biomes.

events.description: discovers campfire and shelter locations indicated by on-screen UI text
weaves through dense trees and rocky obstacles while collecting resources

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense forest while discovering points of interest and gathering resources

entered.detail: thick pine forest blocking sky visibility on the left
dense tree cover on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a denser forest area where the character discovers a campsite and shelter. The trail becomes more winding with frequent rocks and trees requiring navigation, and the ground shows patchy snow coverage mixed with dirt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a frozen mountain pass that gradually transitions into a vibrant autumn forest. It begins with a high-speed ride along a wide, snowy trail flanked by pine forests and distant rocky cliffs. As the path narrows through rocky terrain, the camera crosses a wooden bridge while a notification signals the discovery of a survey drone in the Dauntless Mountains. The scene then opens into a wider valley where the environment shifts, blending snow-dusted pines on the left with yellow autumn foliage on the right. Finally, the trail winds into a denser forest of patchy snow and dirt, leading the camera toward a discovered campsite and shelter.
